The '''Kiris Asteroid Cluster''' was a [[Asteroid field/Legends|belt]] of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] that was nestled within the outer edges of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. The asteroids within the belt were designated by number, with [[Kiris 3]], [[Kiris 6]], and [[Kiris 17]], which marked the "upper" part of the asteroid cluster. The [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Corell/Legends|Corell]] was visible beneath the belt. The belt was known to be in an obscure location, as even native [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] and expert [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had to ask for its coordinates.

==History==
The top-secret [[Kiris shipyards]], constructed on the orders of [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], were hidden within the belt under the assumption that [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large overlooked the asteroid cluster. By the time the first round of battles of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] had run their course, the location had already been picked out by [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Defense Fleet]] flag officer [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]]. During the lead-up to the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]], teams of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-piloted [[StealthX]]s maintained a continuous vigil over the facility, waiting for the Corellians to sally forth their secret fleet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
